mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM demand_tag t INNER JOIN demand_tag_relation r ON t.id = r.tag_id WHERE r.demand_id = #{demandId} ORDER BY t.category, t.name
mapper.update: UPDATE demand_tag SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE id = #{tagId}
UPDATE demand_tag SET use_count = GREATEST(use_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{tagId}
